name: PureSoft Organic Newborn Diapers Size 1
description: Ultra-soft organic cotton diapers designed for newborn delicate skin. Free from chlorine, latex, and fragrances. Wetness indicator and breathable back sheet.

name: Little Voyager Compact Travel Stroller
description: Ultra-lightweight travel stroller weighing only 5.8kg. One-hand fold mechanism fits overhead bins. Perfect for Dubai mall trips and international travel.

name: SnuggleNest Anti-Colic Feeding Bottle Set
description: Complete 6-piece feeding set with advanced venting system to reduce colic. Includes slow-flow silicone nipples mimicking natural breastfeeding.

name: Organic Coconut Baby Wash & Shampoo
description: Certified organic 2-in-1 wash infused with virgin coconut oil and chamomile. Pediatrician-tested for eczema-prone skin. UAE climate suitable.

name: Montessori Wooden Sensory Activity Cube
description: Handcrafted beechwood activity cube featuring bead maze, shape sorter, and gears. Non-toxic water-based paints. Develops fine motor skills and problem-solving.

name: DreamCloud Baby Cot with Mattress
description: Convertible 3-in-1 cot bed with 4 adjustable mattress heights. Includes anti-suffocation mattress. Converts to toddler bed. UAE home delivery.

name: Desert Bloom Maternity Nursing Dress
description: Stylish modal-blend nursing dress with discreet zip access. Designed for UAE climate with moisture-wicking fabric. Suitable for post-partum and beyond.

name: Baby Shower Essential Gift Hamper
description: Curated luxury hamper with organic cotton onesies, bamboo swaddle, natural rubber pacifier, and sensitive skin balm. Arrives in a keepsake woven basket.

name: RashGuard Natural Zinc Diaper Cream
description: Extra-strength 18% zinc oxide barrier cream with calendula and shea butter. Soothes and prevents diaper rash without petroleum. Reef-safe.

name: ErgoTummy High Chair with 3-in-1 Tray
description: Scandinavian design high chair with dishwasher-safe tray inserts. Grows with child from infant to preschooler. Anti-tip legs and 5-point harness.

name: Little Climbers Soft Foam Play Blocks
description: Set of 12 squeezable foam blocks with embossed animals and numbers. Water-resistant and easy wipe-down. Encourages crawling and stacking.

name: Serenity Weighted Sleep Sack 0.5 TOG
description: Gently weighted sleep sack designed for UAE room temperatures (22-25°C). Reversible zip for easy changes. Promotes secure, longer sleep cycles.

name: Blooming Belly Stretch Mark Oil Serum
description: Intensive pregnancy oil with rosehip, vitamin E, and frankincense. Clinically tested for elasticity. Absorbs quickly for massage without greasy residue.

name: Ramadan Newborn Welcome Gift Box
description: Elegant gift box featuring muslin swaddle, embroidered prayer dress, organic date syrup, and gold-plated name bracelet. Perfect Eid or Aqiqah present.

name: SwimSure Reusable Swim Nappies (Pack of 3)
description: Adjustable snap-fit swim diapers with hydrophobic outer layer. Prevents pool accidents without absorbing water. Ideal for Dubai beach days.

name: CoolGrip Silicone Teething Feeder Fruit Paci
description: Mesh-free silicone feeder for introducing fresh fruits safely. Dual-purpose teether soothes sore gums. Twist-lock top prevents messy leaks.

name: Cruisin' 360 Convertible Car Seat
description: Rotating car seat with easy 360° swivel for loading. Extended rear-facing up to 18kg. Side-impact protection pods. UAE road safety approved.

name: Splish Splash Bath Toy Organizer & Set
description: Quick-dry mesh organizer basket with 5 seal-tight bath toys. No holes prevent internal mold. Attaches to tile with strong suction cups.

name: Toddler Trail Cotton Twill Overalls

name: Mama's Bliss Instant Lactation Tea
description: Aromatic herbal blend with fenugreek, fennel, and nettle to support milk supply. Caffeine-free and hydrating. Enjoy hot or iced in UAE heat.

name: Little Astronaut Space Projector & Night Light
description: Rotating star and galaxy projector with soft tummy light. Plays white noise and 3 lullabies. Auto-off timer. STEM-inspired bedroom decor.

name: Cloth Diner Oeko-Tex Splash Mat
description: Absorbent fabric splat mat with waterproof backing. Catches dropped food and art supplies. Machine washable and non-PVC. Essential under high chairs.

name: Tiny Trekkers Baby Carrier Sling
description: Mesh panel structured carrier with built-in hip seat. Redistributes weight to prevent parent back pain. Suitable for UAE summer walks.

name: CloudTouch Organic Jersey Crib Sheet

name: SunSafe Explorer UPF 50+ Rashguard Set

name: Pamper Routine Diaper Caddy Organizer

name: Natural Dyes Scented Play Dough Kit
description: Set of 6 soft dough tubs colored with fruit extracts. Calming lavender and citrus scents. Safe if tasted, but tastes salty.

name: Deep Sleep White Noise Machine & Shusher
description: Portable sound machine with rhythmic shush, fan, and rain tracks. Adaptive technology adjusts volume to ambient noise. Clip to stroller.

name: Golden Dhow Wooden Toy Boat
description: Handmade wooden dhow boat with fabric sail. Water-sealed for bath play. Celebrates UAE maritime heritage in a modern toy.

description: Flexible silicone tray with 9x 1oz pods. Perfect for batch-freezing purees. Push-up base for easy cube removal. Drip-free lid included.

description: Soy wax candle infused with 'baby powder' scent. Custom cotton label with birth date, weight, and name. Lovely centerpiece for welcome home.

description: Solid birch standing tower with adjustable platform. Allows safe participation in kitchen activities. Foldable for compact storage.

description: Mess-free massage bar in biodegradable push tube. Cocoa butter and mango seed oil base. Melts instantly on warm skin. TSA-ready.

description: Two-pack of transparent UV shield (blocks 80% sun) and storm rain cover. Ventilated mesh side windows. Stretchy elastic fits most buggies.

name: Pocket Farm Interactive Soft Book
description: Cloth activity book with removable barn finger puppets. Crinkle pages and squeaker stimulate auditory skills. Machine wash cold.

name: Four Seasons Adjustable Sleep Bag 2.5 TOG

name: Babywearing Coat Extender Cover Panel
description: Quilted fleece-lined insert panel adapting any zip coat to babywearing. Allows skin-to-skin warmth without exposing parent to cold.

name: Newborn Cotton Snap Bodysuits (Pack of 8)
description: Bulk pack of short-sleeve envelope neck bodysuits. Easy snap bottom changes. White and pastels. Hospital bag staple.

name: Cocomelon Sing-Along Boombox Toy
description: Kid-safe boombox playing 8 nursery rhymes with flashing lights. Built-in microphone for sing-alongs. Volume limiter protects hearing.

description: Natural cold relief crystals with eucalyptus, rosemary, and peppermint. Sprinkle in warm bath for soothing steam therapy. Suitable 6+ months.

description: Dachshund shape pull-toy with wagging tail mechanism. Paint-free rubberwood construction. Encourages walking and motor planning.

description: 82cm safety guardrail with breathable mesh. Push-button quiet fold-down for easy access. Portable for hotel co-sleeping setups.

description: Pure 925 silver cups worn inside bra to heal and protect sore nipples. Antimicrobial properties eliminate creams. Reusable for years.

description: Non-toxic Play-Doh compound with Abby Cadabby stamper and fairy garden molds. Encourages storytelling and fine motor sculpting.

name: Family Matching Eid Pajama Set (Parent + Child)
